message:
feat(engine): benchmark freshness gate — immediate-downgrade threshold and sample floor helpers

Add query methods that let callers express policy intent at a higher level
than raw field comparisons:

- ShiftAlarm::meets_immediate_downgrade_threshold(): checks declared
  severity tier weight against a threshold — intentionally keys off
  severity tier (not weighted severity) so operators can tune the
  fail-closed path independently from drift-magnitude math
- AcquisitionEvidence::meets_sample_floor(): checks sample count
- AcquisitionEvidence::supports_freshness(): combines healthy status
  with sample floor check

Tests:
- Immediate-downgrade threshold unit tests across severity tiers
- Sample floor and supports_freshness combination tests
- Enrichment integration tests for new query methods

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
